description: This file defines a custom Flutter widget named RetroHeader, which is a stateless widget extending PreferredSizeWidget. It creates a styled AppBar with a gradient background, customizable title, subtitle, and optional actions.

classes.name: RetroHeader
classes.description: A custom app bar widget with gradient background, large height, and customizable title, subtitle, and actions.

methods.name: preferredSize
methods.description: Returns the preferred size of the header, fixed at 86 height units.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Constructs the widget tree for the RetroHeader, including styling and layout.
